title: South Korea Visa Application
description: Application for a South Korean entry visa (사증, sa-jeung), filed by a foreign national at a Korean diplomatic mission (embassy or consulate-general) abroad, through the Ministry of Justice's gazetted Visa Application Form used uniformly across every visa category and mission worldwide. Covers personal details, passport information, contact information, marital/family details, education, employment, details of the intended visit (purpose, dates, prior travel history), invitation details, funding details, and the applicant's declaration. Does not model the separate Confirmation of Visa Issuance process (사증발급인정신청서, Attached Form No. 21 — filed by a sponsor/inviter already in Korea, a different form and process), the HiKorea e-Application portal's authenticated wizard (hikorea.go.kr, which requires an ARC/account login to view), or the purpose-specific supporting-document list in Enforcement Rule Annex 5 (which varies across roughly 30 visa purpose categories). It does not submit the application; the live visa.go.kr source and the responsible diplomatic mission are always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

authority.name: Ministry of Justice, Republic of Korea — Korea Immigration Service

source.documentRef: 출입국관리법 시행규칙 별지 제17호서식 (개정 2022. 2. 7.) — Enforcement Rule of the Immigration Act, Attached Form No. 17, Visa Application Form (amended 2022-02-07), bilingual Korean/English, hosted directly by the Korea Visa Portal (visa.go.kr) and mirrored byte-for-byte at Korean diplomatic missions worldwide (e.g. overseas.mofa.go.kr embassy sites).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored field-by-field from the Ministry of Justice/Korea Immigration Service gazetted Visa Application Form (・別紙 第17号書式, Enforcement Rule of the Immigration Act Attached Form No. 17, amended 2022-02-07), a bilingual Korean/English PDF downloaded directly from the Korea Visa Portal (visa.go.kr/downfile/VisaapplicationForm_EN.pdf), a static PDF with a real text layer (no scanned image, no login, no CAPTCHA). Picked up from the GOV-1289 new-jurisdiction research candidate backlog (this was GOV-1292), one of two remaining South Korea vertical gaps alongside GOV-1293 (Taxes) after GOV-1291/GOV-1294 closed DMV and National ID. Closes South Korea's Visa vertical (now 4/6 KR verticals modelled: Passport, DMV, National ID, Visa), and moves the global Visa vertical from 10/13 to 11/13 jurisdictions. The FOR OFFICIAL USE ONLY block on page 1 (processing/approval fields completed by the diplomatic mission, not the applicant) is explicitly out of scope, consistent with this registry's convention of modelling only applicant-supplied fields. The form's several repeating tables (prior Korea visits, prior other-country trips, family members in Korea, accompanying family members) are each flattened to a single 'most recent/first entry' field set, since GovSchema v0.3 fields are flat with no array/repeating-group model yet (spec/v0.3/SPEC.md §6.1) — the same precedent already used by in/mha/evisa-etourist's previousVisaType/previousVisaPlaceOfIssue/previousVisaDateOfIssue fields. Two related processes are explicitly out of scope and noted in the description: the Confirmation of Visa Issuance form (사증발급인정신청서, Attached Form No. 21 — filed by a sponsor/inviter already resident in Korea, a structurally different process/form), and the HiKorea e-Application portal (hikorea.go.kr), which requires an ARC/account login to reach its data-entry wizard and was therefore not usable as a live-DOM source (same login-gated-portal class recorded elsewhere in this registry, e.g. nz/dia/realme-verified-identity, de/auswaertiges-amt/national-visa-application). Status remains 'draft' pending an independent second reviewer's field-by-field pass; see the review-gate issue.

fields.description: The specific Korean visa/status-of-stay category code (e.g. C-3, D-2, E-7) the applicant is applying for. The form provides a blank field rather than a fixed checkbox list here; the 'FOR OFFICIAL USE ONLY' block that follows on the same form (basic details, reception, approval) is completed by the diplomatic mission, not the applicant, and is out of scope for this schema.

A future MINOR version could add a repeating-group model once the spec supports it (GSP-0009, proposed).

documents.sourceRef: Visa Application Form (사증발급신청서, Attached Form No. 17) — Item 1, PHOTO box: color photo taken within the last 6 months, full face without hat, front view against a white or off-white background.

documents.label: Supporting documents required for the specific visa category applied for
documents.sourceRef: 출입국관리법 시행규칙 제76조제1항 및 별표5 (Enforcement Rule Article 76(1) and Annex 5) — the attachment list varies by the specific visa category/purpose (roughly 30 categories); not enumerated in this schema (see VERIFICATION.md).
